short_zh: 一名男子在雪地森林中为白马套上挽具，画面以 [V] 风格呈现。
short_en: A man is harnessing a white horse in a snowy forest, rendered in [V] style.
medium_zh: 在一片被雪覆盖的森林中，一名身穿深色外套的男子正弯腰为一匹白马套上挽具，背景是光秃的树木和废弃的车辆，画面以 [V] 风格呈现，构图聚焦于人与马的互动。
medium_en: In a snowy forest, a man in a dark coat bends to harness a white horse, with bare trees and abandoned vehicles in the background. The scene is composed to focus on the interaction between man and horse, presented in [V] style.
detailed_zh: 画面中，一名戴着帽子、身穿深绿色外套和黑色靴子的男子正站在雪地中，弯腰为一匹佩戴挽具的白马调整缰绳。白马站立在画面中央偏右，姿态温顺。背景是冬季的森林，树木枝干裸露，地面覆盖着积雪，远处可见一辆废弃的汽车和一个木制棚屋。整个画面以 [V] 风格呈现，色彩饱和度极高，光影对比强烈，线条锐利，营造出一种超现实的视觉氛围。
detailed_en: A man wearing a cap, a dark green coat, and black boots stands in the snow, bending to adjust the reins of a white horse fitted with a harness. The horse stands calmly in the center-right of the frame. The background features a winter forest with bare trees, snow-covered ground, and a distant abandoned car and wooden shed. The entire scene is rendered in [V] style, featuring highly saturated colors, strong contrast, sharp lines, and an overall surreal visual atmosphere.
user_prompt_zh: 请帮我生成一张 [V] 风格的雪地森林场景，画面中一名男子正在为白马套上挽具。
user_prompt_en: Generate an image in [V] style showing a man harnessing a white horse in a snowy forest.

short_zh: 一张以 [V] 风格呈现的时尚生活静物图
short_en: A still life image presented in [V] style
medium_zh: 一张以 [V] 风格呈现的静物图，画面中一个棕色皮质手提包、一杯饮品、一份布丁和一部手机摆放在木质桌面上，背景是充满活力的渐变色抽象涂鸦，整体构图平视，色彩饱和度高，光影对比强烈。
medium_en: A still life composition in [V] style, featuring a brown leather handbag, a drink, a pudding, and a smartphone arranged on a wooden surface, with a vibrant gradient abstract background, shot from a level perspective with high saturation and strong contrast.
detailed_zh: 一张以 [V] 风格呈现的静物摄影，画面主体为一个深棕色皮质手提包，包上挂着一个棕色毛绒小狗挂件，旁边是一杯插有肉桂棒和香草的饮品，以及一份顶部点缀着草莓和奶油的布丁，布丁旁放着一把金属勺子。右侧是一部浅蓝色手机壳，印有黑色腊肠犬图案和“LUCKY DOG”字样。所有物品置于一张红棕色木质桌面上，背景是荧光绿、粉红、蓝色交织的抽象涂鸦，带有明显的刮痕质感。画面采用平视角度拍摄，光线从左上方打来，在物体表面形成高光和锐利阴影，整体色彩饱和度极高，营造出强烈的视觉冲击力和时尚感。
detailed_en: A still life photograph rendered in [V] style, featuring a deep brown leather handbag with a brown plush dog keychain, a drink topped with cinnamon stick and herbs, and a pudding garnished with a strawberry and whipped cream, accompanied by a metal spoon. To the right is a light blue phone case decorated with black dachshund silhouettes and the text 'LUCKY DOG'. All items are arranged on a reddish-brown wooden table. The background is an abstract graffiti-style gradient of fluorescent green, pink, and blue, with visible brushstroke textures. Shot from a level angle, the lighting originates from the upper left, creating sharp highlights and defined shadows on the objects. The overall color palette is highly saturated, producing a visually striking and fashionable atmosphere.
user_prompt_zh: 请帮我生成一张 [V] 风格的时尚生活静物图，包含手提包、饮品、布丁和手机，摆放在木质桌面上，背景是高饱和度的抽象涂鸦。
user_prompt_en: Generate a [V] style still life image featuring a handbag, a drink, a pudding, and a smartphone arranged on a wooden table, with a high-saturation abstract graffiti background.

short_zh: 一只幼犬趴在地毯上，画面以 [V] 风格呈现
short_en: A puppy lying on a rug, presented in [V] style
medium_zh: 一只哈士奇幼犬趴在红色地毯上，背景是木质柜子，画面整体以 [V] 风格呈现，带有几何图形和霓虹色光效
medium_en: A husky puppy lying on a red rug, with wooden cabinets in the background, the entire scene rendered in [V] style with geometric shapes and neon lighting effects
detailed_zh: 一只哈士奇幼犬侧身趴在红色纹理地毯上，身旁有一个紫色毛线球玩具，背景是暖色调木质柜子，画面中叠加了蓝色、粉色、黄色的几何图形，整体光线带有强烈的霓虹色偏移，呈现出 [V] 风格的视觉效果
detailed_en: A husky puppy lies sideways on a red textured rug, with a purple yarn ball toy beside it, against a backdrop of warm-toned wooden cabinets. The image features overlaid geometric shapes in blue, pink, and yellow, with strong neon color shifts in lighting, creating a [V] style visual effect
user_prompt_zh: 请帮我生成一张 [V] 风格的室内幼犬照片，幼犬趴在红色地毯上，背景是木质柜子，画面中加入霓虹色几何图形
user_prompt_en: Generate an indoor photo of a puppy lying on a red rug with wooden cabinets in the background, rendered in [V] style, and include neon-colored geometric shapes

short_zh: 一位身着旗袍的女性肖像，以 [V] 风格呈现
short_en: A portrait of a woman in a qipao, rendered in [V] style
medium_zh: 画面中央是一位梳着发髻、佩戴花朵发饰和彩色耳坠的女性，身着带有花卉图案的旗袍。背景为充满数字故障艺术效果的抽象色块，整体以 [V] 风格呈现，构图为居中特写，视角平视。
medium_en: The central subject is a woman with an updo hairstyle, adorned with a floral hairpin and colorful dangling earrings, wearing a qipao with floral patterns. The background consists of abstract color blocks with digital glitch art effects. The composition is a centered close-up shot with a level eye perspective, rendered in [V] style.
detailed_zh: 这是一张以 [V] 风格呈现的女性肖像特写。画面主体是一位年轻女性，她梳着精致的黑色发髻，右侧发间别着一朵粉紫色的花朵，佩戴着蓝红金三色相间的复古耳坠。她身穿一件白色底、粉色花卉图案的旗袍，领口为高领设计。背景是充满赛博朋克感的抽象数字故障效果，由紫色、粉色、黄色和青色的色块与水平条纹构成，部分区域有像素化和色彩错位。画面采用平视视角，构图居中，人物面部清晰，背景虚化处理，整体氛围充满未来感与复古融合的视觉张力。
detailed_en: This is a close-up portrait of a young woman rendered in [V] style. She has a neat black updo hairstyle, with a pink-purple flower pinned to the right side of her head, and wears vintage-style dangling earrings in blue, red, and gold. She is dressed in a white qipao with pink floral patterns and a high collar. The background features abstract digital glitch art, composed of blocks and horizontal stripes in shades of purple, pink, yellow, and cyan, with areas exhibiting pixelation and color distortion. The shot is taken from a level eye perspective, centered composition, with the subject's face in sharp focus and the background softly blurred, creating a visual tension between futuristic and retro aesthetics.
user_prompt_zh: 请帮我生成一张 [V] 风格的女性旗袍肖像，背景为数字故障艺术效果。
user_prompt_en: Generate a portrait of a woman in a qipao in [V] style, with a digital glitch art background.
